articles.title: FDA Blocks Life-Saving Melanoma Drug as Makary Takes Heat for Challenging Pharma Protocols
articles.summary: The FDA blocked a promising genetically engineered melanoma treatment RP1 that shrank tumors in one-third of clinical trial patients. The agency's obstruction comes amid chaos under new leadership that threatens to disrupt the cozy pharma-regulator revolving door.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Exposes Autism-Vaccine Research Fraud and Medical Literature Corruption
articles.summary: An autism-vaccine researcher faces criminal charges while 'accidental watermarks' reveal widespread fraud in medical publishing. Mass resignations plague journals as the zombie journal epidemic spreads through corrupted scientific literature.

articles.title: Texas Hospital Secretly Continued Child Mutilation Despite State Ban — Now Forced to Fund Detransition Clinic
articles.summary: Texas Children's Hospital doctors illegally performed sex-rejection procedures on children in defiance of state law prohibiting what Governor Abbott calls 'child abuse.' The hospital must now fund a detransition clinic as part of settlement.

articles.title: FDA Destroys ImmunityBio After Exposing Fraudulent Cancer Claims — $2 Billion Market Cap Evaporated
articles.summary: The FDA finally acted against ImmunityBio's misleading cancer treatment claims, causing shares to plunge 21% and wiping out $2 billion in market value. Investors launch lawsuits as another pharma fraud scheme collapses under regulatory scrutiny.

articles.title: Eight Devastating Truths About COVID Excess Mortality the Establishment Won't Acknowledge
articles.summary: Critical analysis reveals eight pivotal facts about 2020-2025 excess mortality that health authorities continue to suppress. The data exposes uncomfortable truths about pandemic response policies and their deadly consequences.

articles.title: Geranylgeraniol Breakthrough: The Statin Damage Reversal Big Pharma Doesn't Want You to Know
articles.summary: Dr. Mercola reveals how geranylgeraniol reverses statin-induced muscle damage and prevents bisphosphonate jaw necrosis — treatments the medical establishment ignores. This compound offers hope where mainstream medicine's CoQ10 recommendations fail patients.

articles.title: Cancer Industry's Biggest Threat: The Breast Cancer Advance They're Trying to Bury
articles.summary: Alan Cassels exposes the most significant breast cancer breakthrough in two decades that threatens the cancer treatment industrial complex. The Brownstone Institute reveals why this advance faces systematic suppression from entrenched medical interests.

articles.title: Political Psychiatry Exposed: How Medical Authorities Manufactured the Trans Epidemic
articles.summary: Max Dublin's devastating analysis reveals how psychiatric institutions weaponized gender dysphoria diagnosis to create a lucrative medical pipeline. The Brownstone Institute exposes the political manipulation behind the trans treatment industrial complex.

articles.title: FDA Blocks Promising Melanoma Drug While One-Third of Patients See Tumor Shrinkage
articles.summary: The FDA blocked a genetically engineered melanoma treatment called RP1 despite clinical trial data showing tumors shrank in a third of patients. The agency's interference under Makary demonstrates the familiar pattern of regulatory capture blocking patient access to potentially life-saving treatments.

articles.title: 25-Year Government Fraud: Corrupted Hyperbaric Therapy Research Denies Veterans Healing
articles.summary: For over 25 years, government-funded hyperbaric medicine research used a biologically active placebo that generates 300% increases in circulating stem cells, corrupting all trial data. This multimillion-dollar fraud has systematically blocked veterans from accessing proven hyperbaric oxygen therapy for PTSD and brain injuries.
